home.title: A Living Community, United by Faith
home.subtitle: Our platform is the bridge for you to find people, share experiences, and cultivate friendships that strengthen your journey.
home.features_subtitle: The community goes beyond the map. Get involved with the various arms of Reinhard Hirtler's ministry, find people with the same vision, and participate in projects that transform lives.
home.feature1_desc: Find and share experiences with other students of the Prophetic and Supernatural School.
home.feature2_desc: Learn about and support the NGO that transforms the lives of children in Brazil through institutional shelters.
home.stats_subtitle: Our numbers reflect the impact and reach of our faith.
home.mock_card_join_prompt: Join the community to connect with real members.

login.title: Login
login.description: Enter with your email to access the community map.

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.description: Create your account to connect with the community. Indicating an existing member can speed up your approval.
signup.languages_description: Separate the languages you speak with a comma.
signup.sponsor_section_desc: To speed up your approval, indicate a community member you know. If you don't know anyone, your registration will be reviewed by an administrator.
signup.sponsor_from_url_success: By completing your registration, your profile will be automatically approved.
signup.error_toast_desc: Please check the errors in the form.

courses.page_subtitle: Access a complete library of videos, series, and live streams to transform your life and ministry.
courses.featured_subtitle: Randomly selected series to boost your growth.
courses.load_error: Could not load courses from Hotmart at the moment.
courses.load_error_hint: Check the credentials in the .env file
courses.subscription_title: Total Access to the Limitless Community
courses.subscription_desc: The best option for those who don't want to miss anything. With the monthly subscription, you unlock all our content, present and future.
courses.feature_videos_desc: Hundreds of study videos, including all special series.
courses.feature_lives_desc: Participate in live broadcasts with Reinhard Hirtler and guests.
courses.all_courses_desc: Explore our complete library and choose the topic that burns most in your heart.

events.page_subtitle: Participate in our gatherings, in-person or online.
events.no_events_desc: Stay tuned! We'll have news soon.
events.details_not_found_desc: The event you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
events.details_report_empty: No report or photos added yet.
events.create_form_desc: Fill in the information to organize a community gathering.
events.form_description_placeholder: Details about what will happen, the purpose, etc.
events.form_description_hint: Be clear and inviting. You can use line breaks.
events.form_dates_hint: Select one or more days on the calendar.
events.form_recurrence_placeholder: E.g.: Every first Thursday of the month, except holidays.
events.form_recurrence_hint: Use for complex rules the calendar doesn't cover.
events.form_image_url_hint: Use an image that represents your event well.
events.form_is_public_hint: If enabled, this event will be visible to people without an account.
events.form_location_hint: Enter the address and select an option to appear on the map.

testimonies.page_subtitle: Stories of faith, miracles, and transformation that edify our community.
testimonies.no_testimonies_desc: Be the first to share what God has been doing in your life!
testimonies.details_not_found_desc: This testimony may have been removed or the link is incorrect.
testimonies.details_restricted_desc: You need to be logged in to view this testimony.
testimonies.delete_dialog_desc: This action cannot be undone and will permanently delete your testimony.
testimonies.form_create_desc: Tell the community about the wonders God has done in your life.
testimonies.form_edit_desc: Update your story to edify the community.
testimonies.form_title_placeholder: E.g.: The Miracle of Healing in My Family
testimonies.form_content_hint: Be detailed and build up the faith of others.
testimonies.form_video_hint: YouTube, Vimeo, Shorts, Loom, or DailyMotion.
testimonies.form_public_hint: If enabled, your testimony can be seen by people outside the community.
testimonies.toast_success_desc: Thank you for sharing what God has been doing.
testimonies.recommendation_no_product_found: The material was mentioned in the text, but we couldn't find an automatic link on Hotmart.
testimonies.recommendation_no_product_admin_hint: You can approve the mention or reject it if it's incorrect.

admin.dashboard_greeting: Welcome to your dashboard. Manage the community and monitor activities.
admin.add_member_page_desc: Fill in the data to create a new (cosmetic) profile in the community. No invitation email will be sent.
admin.add_member_email_hint: Can be a fictitious email for demo profiles.
admin.add_member_bio_placeholder: Tell us a little about the new member...
admin.add_member_whatsapp_hint: Numbers only, including country code (e.g., 55 for Brazil).
admin.add_member_instagram_hint: Just the username, without the "@" or full URL.
admin.add_member_approve_hint: If enabled, the profile will be publicly visible.
admin.toast_add_member_success_desc: The profile for {firstName} was created successfully.
admin.courses_page_desc: Automatic links already work for all courses. Optionally configure custom links (e.g., affiliates) and custom cover images.
admin.courses_toast_delete_success_desc: The manual link has been deleted.
admin.courses_delete_confirm: Remove custom settings? The course will revert to using automatic link and image.
admin.moderation_page_desc: Approve or reject new registrations in the community.
admin.recommendations_page_desc: Review the materials the AI identified in testimonies before sending them for user approval.
admin.recommendations_approve_toast_desc: The user will receive an alert to approve it on their profile.
admin.translations_page_desc: Add and edit translations for the site's languages. The keys are based on the 'pt' language.
admin.users_page_desc: View, edit, or remove members from the community.
admin.users_empty_search: No users found for your search.
admin.users_delete_dialog_desc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the profile of {name} from the database.
admin.edit_user_page_desc: Adjust the user's profile data. The email cannot be changed here.
admin.edit_user_email_immutable_hint: Email is used for login and cannot be changed.
admin.edit_user_is_traveler_hint: Check if the user is currently traveling.
admin.edit_user_toast_success_desc: The information for {name} has been saved.

dashboard.title: Community Map
dashboard.invite_box_toast_desc: Send it to who you want to invite.
dashboard.pending_requests_desc: People have indicated they know you.
dashboard.pending_requests_approve_toast_desc: The user is now part of the community.
dashboard.awaiting_approval_banner: Your account is awaiting approval. You do not appear on the public map yet.
dashboard.awaiting_approval_banner_hint: For now, you can only see your own location on the map. After approval, you will see all community members.
dashboard.user_recommendations_alert_desc: Our AI identified materials you mentioned in your testimonies. Would you like them to appear as recommendations for readers?
dashboard.recommendation_not_found: The material was mentioned in the text, but we couldn't find an automatic link on Hotmart.
dashboard.recommendation_admin_hint: You can approve the citation or reject if it's incorrect.
dashboard.user_recommendations_approve_toast_desc: The recommendation now appears on your testimony to bless others.

profile.page_desc: Keep your information up-to-date for the community.
profile.is_traveler_desc: Check if you are currently traveling.
profile.bio_placeholder: Tell us a little about yourself...
profile.visibility_hidden: Hidden (Do not appear on the map)
profile.privacy_settings_desc: Control what information on your profile is visible to other members.
profile.invite_section_desc: Share your personal invitation link. New members who sign up through it will be automatically approved.
profile.toast_update_success_desc: Your information has been saved successfully.
profile.invite_box_toast_desc: Send it to those you want to invite.
profile.language_preference_desc: Choose the language for the site interface.
profile.avatar_upload_desc: The image will be resized to 256x256 pixels.
profile.toast_avatar_too_large_desc: Please select an image smaller than 5MB.

delete_account.title: Are you sure?
delete_account.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove your data from our servers.

connected_accounts.title: Connected Accounts
connected_accounts.description: Manage the social accounts linked to your profile.
connected_accounts.toast_unlink_error_password: You must set a password before unlinking your social account to avoid being locked out.

password_recovery.forgot_description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
password_recovery.link_sent: If an account exists with this email, a reset link has been sent.
password_recovery.reset_success: Password reset successfully. You can now login.
password_recovery.password_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.intro: Your privacy is a priority for our community. This policy details how we treat your personal data transparently, in compliance with LGPD (Brazil) and GDPR (Europe).
privacy_policy.section1_content: We only collect data necessary for the platform's operation: (a) Registration Data: Name, email, and photo (via direct or social login); (b) Public Profile: Bio, city, country, languages, and social media links voluntarily provided by you; (c) Support and Feedback: When you send feedback, we collect your email and the 'User Agent' (browser type and operating system) to facilitate the resolution of technical issues.
privacy_policy.section2_content: We do not collect your real-time location via GPS. You manually inform your city and country. Displaying this data on the community map is completely optional (opt-in) and can be enabled or disabled at any time in your visibility settings.
privacy_policy.section3_content: You have granular control over what you want to display to other members. It is possible to individually hide fields such as your photo, bio, languages, or contact links (WhatsApp, Telegram, etc.) without having to close your entire profile.
privacy_policy.section4_content: Your contact data is only visible to authenticated community members that you authorize through your settings. We do not sell or share your data with advertisers or third parties outside the platform's support infrastructure.
privacy_policy.section5_content: You have the right to access, correct, or permanently delete your data at any time. By deleting your account in the profile settings, all your personal data, testimonies, and records will be removed from our active servers, respecting the 'Right to be Forgotten'.

terms_of_service.title: Terms of Use
terms_of_service.intro: Welcome to our community. By using this platform, you agree to the rules below, established to maintain a safe and edifying environment for everyone.
terms_of_service.section1_content: Access to the platform is preferably done via invitation. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for proper conduct within the community. Offensive behavior, spam, or misuse of the invitation system may result in the immediate suspension of your access.
terms_of_service.section2_content: By publishing testimonies, events, or suggestions on the Roadmap, you guarantee that you own the rights to the content and that it does not violate third-party rights. We reserve the right to moderate, edit, or remove content that is reported or that violates the community's values and safety.
terms_of_service.section3_content: The platform facilitates connection between members through external contact links. However, we have no control over and are not responsible for interactions, conversations, or information exchanges that occur outside our domain (in applications like WhatsApp, Telegram, or third-party sites). We recommend caution when sharing sensitive data privately.
terms_of_service.section4_content: The platform is provided 'as is'. While we strive to ensure safety, we are not responsible for in-person meetings organized through the events section or for the individual conduct of members. Participation in events and contact with other users are your sole responsibility.

data_deletion.title: Data Deletion Instructions
data_deletion.intro: According to the Facebook Apps and Websites rules, we provide User Data Deletion Callback URL or Data Deletion Instructions URL. If you want to delete your activities for the Community Without Limits App, you can remove your information by following these steps:
data_deletion.step1_content: Go to your Facebook Account's Setting & Privacy. Click 'Settings'.
data_deletion.step2_content: Look for 'Apps and Websites' and you will see all of the apps and websites you linked with your Facebook.
data_deletion.step3_content: Search and Click 'Community Without Limits' in the search bar. Scroll and click 'Remove'. This will revoke the app's access to your Facebook account.
data_deletion.contact_support: If you wish for all your data associated with our platform to be permanently deleted from our database, please contact us at:

social_avatar_confirmation.title: Use {provider} Profile Picture?
social_avatar_confirmation.description: We found a profile picture from your {provider} account. Would you like to use it as your profile picture on Community Without Limits?
social_avatar_confirmation.toast_success_desc: Thank you for being part of our community! Your profile picture helps us connect better.
social_avatar_confirmation.toast_cancel_desc: We appreciate you! You can always update your profile picture later in your settings.
social_avatar_confirmation.toast_error_desc: We couldn't update your profile picture. Please try again later.
